body: This PR is identical to https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/1722, https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/pull/4287, and https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/pull/1738. There is a concurrency limit of 5 MacOS runners for the entire organization.
title: Use MacOS runners only on PR merges
